Hill Hold and Hill Descent Control

faqs.question: What is the price of Mahindra Scorpio-N?
faqs.answer: The Mahindra Scorpio-N is priced between approximately Rs. 13.49 Lakh and Rs. 24.95 Lakh (ex-showroom), depending on the variant, fuel type, transmission, and drivetrain.

faqs.question: Does the Scorpio-N come with 4WD?
faqs.answer: Yes, 4WD is available on select diesel variants of the Scorpio-N, paired with either a manual or automatic transmission.

faqs.question: What is the seating capacity of the Scorpio-N?
faqs.answer: The Scorpio-N is available in both 6-seater and 7-seater configurations depending on the variant.

faqs.question: Does the Scorpio-N have ADAS?
faqs.answer: Yes, select higher variants of the Scorpio-N come equipped with a Level 2 ADAS suite including adaptive cruise control, lane departure warning, and autonomous emergency braking.
